prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `25c199f5`.
codex_response:
Implemented the new ARC2 task package for `25c199f5` in [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_25c199f5/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_25c199f5/verifier.py#L1), and [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_25c199f5/generator.py#L1). The rule is: split the `5x17` input into three `5x5` panels separated by `6`, take the non-`7` rows from right, then middle, then left, and top-pad with all-`7` rows to get a `5x5` output. The `opus46` hint was used because it matched the official examples exactly; no `notes.md` was needed.

The verifier uses `hsplit`, row filtering, and top padding directly in RE-ARC style at [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_25c199f5/verifier.py#L4). The generator stays close to the official family by keeping the fixed three-panel layout, using outer panels with one color and the middle panel with the opposite color, sampling motif heights from the observed compositions, and drawing only small monochrome motifs seen in the task family at [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_25c199f5/generator.py#L4). No new primitive in `arc2/dsl_ext.py` was necessary.

Validation passed end to end: `7/7` official examples passed, the shared build produced 1000 examples, and `1000/1000` generated examples passed verification. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/25c199f5/task.json), [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/25c199f5/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/25c199f5/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/25c199f5/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/25c199f5/previews/preview_03.png).
